# Affordable Immigration Services — Salem, OR
> Affordable Immigration Services — bilingual immigration attorney in Salem, Oregon. Green cards, citizenship, work permits, family petitions and deportation defense. Free, confidential consultation. 3545 Portland Rd NE, Suite 110. Call (971) 308-5892. Spanish-first, affordable immigration services on Portland Rd — fees explained up front.

## Services
- Family & Green Cards
- Citizenship & Naturalization
- Work Permits & Visas
- Removal / Deportation Defense
- Asylum & Humanitarian
- DACA & Renewals

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (971) 308-5892 · Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm · Languages: English, Español
